/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/flux.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/flux.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flux.dir/src/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flux.dir/src/system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flux.dir/src/package.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flux.dir/src/dev.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flux.dir/src/api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flux.dir/src/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flux.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flux.dir/src/plugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flux.dir/src/utils.cpp.o -o flux  /usr/lib/libcurl.so /usr/lib/libcurl.so
